name: Machi Komacine
description:
Machi is fixing up your arm in a hotel room.

(I'm impulsive when it comes to making bots. My main problem is coming up with interesting scenarios, which is why I leave the character definition open so y'all can copy and put your own scenarios to your lesiure. Or add info or decrease the token count. Hell, you can copy and post the bot if y'all want with an alt scenario, just remember to credit.)

(but I'm having fun again so expect at least one more. Perhaps Shizuku or another JJK bot, I've got Megumi in the backburner. The only sorcerer of today is defintely coming though, Kusakabe is going to save the Soul Society. RIP Maki though.)
creator: Ragtagjungle
